message:
fix: add XDG config paths for OpenCode connector on macOS (#146)

On macOS, dirs::data_local_dir() returns ~/Library/Application Support,
which misses XDG-style installs that place data under ~/.config/opencode/.
Now storage_root() and sqlite_db_path() also check dirs::config_dir() and
~/.config/opencode/ as fallback paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
